vulnerablePopulations: women of childbearing age (medication choice considerations)
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ILAE criteria with EEG patterns; syndrome-based classification and risk counseling

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to specialist care and broad ASM formulary

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to EEG and specialist epilepsy clinics in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Syndrome-based ASM selection with pregnancy risk management; structured counseling and follow-up
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Cross-country variability in services and medication reimbursement
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong specialist networks and access to modern ASMs
